subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Jan. 1909
subcodes.first_line: This do We proclaim: were God to act with justice, not David alone [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ما این را می گوئیم نه تنها حضرت داود اگر خدا به عدل رفتار کند
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation
